title: Senior Teacher - Anna University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Anna University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!
